unit_vocabulary.meaning: 上气不接下气，喘不过气来
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Why are you out of breath? Have you been running?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 跑得太快，气(breath)都跑出去(out)了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've been working hard. Now I'm going to have a break.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: break有“打断”的意思，打断工作就是休息。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've been thinking about what you said and I've decided to take your advice.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: take是拿走，拿走别人的建议并使用它。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Chris hasn't been feeling well recently.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: recent(最近的) + ly(后缀) = 最近。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Laura has been travelling in South America for the last three months.
Don't disturb me now. I'm working.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dis(分开) + turb(搅动) -> 搅动思绪，即打扰。
hurry(赶紧) + up(向上/程度) -> 快快快。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Jane's little boy comes into the house with a very dirty face.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dirt(泥土) + y(形容词后缀) -> 像泥土一样的，即脏的。
sit(坐/位子) + uation -> 处于某个位子的状态，即情况。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We use the present perfect continuous for an activity that has recently stopped.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: act(行动) + ivity -> 行动的表现，即活动。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No, but the ground is wet.
I've been talking to Amanda and she agrees with me.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: a + gree(一致) + with -> 和某人一致，即同意。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Silvia is a very good tennis player.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: tennis(网球) + player(玩的人/运动员)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How long have you been learning English?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: how(如何) + long(长的/久) -> 问多久。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is sitting on the grass panting and resting.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 跑累了像平底锅(pan)里的气泡一样喘气。
